span.p:
API Tester
调试聊天、会话与接口联调

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Knowledge Manager
管理文件上传、文档索引与知识库操作

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Application Runtime
装配依赖、注册 FastAPI 路由并暴露统一 API

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Chat / Session API
处理聊天、会话、文件与知识文档请求入口

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Scenes
封装 generic_assistant 与 ecommerce 的场景定义、工具与知识组织

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Knowledge Service
负责文档加载、切块、校验与索引管理

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RAG Engine
执行检索编排、证据聚合与回答生成链路

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Model Router & LLM Client
统一模型路由并对接外部大模型能力

span.p:
Tool Protocol
